chunks.summary: A female voice speaks about fear and control, followed by a menacing male voice threatening violence and referencing Raul Menendez.

The audio begins with a menacing narrator (spk_002) speaking of scale, followed by an authoritative female voice (spk_001) discussing Menendez. The scene shifts to a conversation between a younger male (spk_003, likely David) and an older mentor figure (spk_004) regarding the future and their responsibilities.
The chunk contains brief radio communication between command and a field operative requesting a situation report.
Speaker 3 (David) expresses disbelief that the situation is real, and Speaker 4 (the mentor figure) sharply corrects him.
The audio chunk features a segment of Metallica's 'Master of Puppets' playing, followed by the mentor figure (Speaker 4) telling someone to pull it together.
The antagonist taunts the protagonist about the difficulty of killing an idea, followed by a confrontation involving a female leader and a mentor figure, ending with an aggressive outburst.
A promotional announcer provides information about a pre-order bonus, specifically the Reznov challenge pack.
No speech detected in this 0.04s window.

mechanicalTranscript:
--- CHUNK 0 [0.00s - 20.00s] ---
[0.00-5.50] Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
[9.00-10.50] Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
[13.00-17.00] Speaker 2: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
[17.50-20.00] Speaker 2: Raul Menendez ignited global unrest...

--- CHUNK 1 [20.00s - 40.00s] ---
[20.00-21.80] Speaker 2: on an unprecedented scale.
[23.20-27.00] Speaker 1: Menendez is a terrorist. We're bringing peace and security to the world.
[28.00-29.50] Speaker 3: He refuses to let me go.
[30.20-33.00] Speaker 4: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
[35.00-36.50] Speaker 4: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

--- CHUNK 2 [40.00s - 60.00s] ---
[51.50-52.50] Speaker 5: Specter One, report.
[54.50-55.50] Speaker 6: Need a sitrep.

--- CHUNK 3 [60.00s - 80.00s] ---
[61.60-62.60] Speaker 3: This isn't real.
[63.20-64.10] Speaker 4: The hell it ain't!

--- CHUNK 4 [80.00s - 100.00s] ---
[80.00-96.50] Speaker 8: Master! Master! Where's the dreams that I've been after? Master! Master! You promised only lies!
[96.50-98.50] Speaker 4: Pull it together, man!

--- CHUNK 5 [100.00s - 120.00s] ---
[100.00-102.50] Speaker 2: So eager to lead, are we?
[102.50-106.80] Speaker 2: Killing a man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
[108.00-110.50] Speaker 1: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
[112.00-115.00] Speaker 4: No more games. This ends now.
[116.00-119.50] Speaker 8: Obey your master!

--- CHUNK 6 [120.00s - 140.00s] ---
[120.00-123.50] Speaker 9: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

--- CHUNK 7 [140.00s - 140.04s] ---
